evidence: Chunk 1 Foundation: lib/db.ts (lazy neon), lib/auth.ts (lazy getServerSession), middleware.ts, api/health, api/auth/[...nextauth]
Chunk 2 AIVS Core: api/verify (rate limiting, idempotent, verifyAIVSBundle), VerifierWidget, ProofSeal, ReceiptCard, AuditTimeline
Chunk 3 Receipt Storage: api/receipts/[id] (ID regex validation), /receipt/[id] page (server-rendered)
Chunk 4 Stripe: lib/stripe.ts (lazy getter, apiVersion 2024-12-18.acacia), webhook (constructEvent), checkout, portal, /pricing
Chunk 5 Landing: full homepage with VerifierWidget embedded, /about, /pricing, 404, sitemap, robots
Chunk 6 Dashboard: authenticated /dashboard, receipt history table, billing portal, user API routes, export
All guardrails enforced: no any types, lazy Stripe/Neon clients, Suspense around useSearchParams, constructEvent webhook verification
Security headers in next.config.ts: X-Frame-Options DENY, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy
Site-local logo, nav, footer (no shared-ui SiteHeader/SiteFooter imports)
